Which Came First: Consciousness or Life? Preface

Which Came First: Consciousness or Life? Noushin Nabavi 2026-05-24 Preface This book explores scientific, philosophical, and metaphysical theories concerning the relationship between life and consciousness.

Chapter 1 (PART) Part I — Framing the Question This part introduces the central conceptual and scientific foundations of the book. It explores the definitions of life and consciousness, the relationship between scientific and philosophical explanations, and the role of emergence, complexity, information, and self-organization in understanding reality.
